reference: There are no strict food timings for a child of this age. However, you should feed her frequently. Sleeping is a natural phenomenon, and children do and should sleep more than adults. Give her meals at least four to five times a day, and even more if she is hungry. This will enhance her growth.
text: There are no strict food timings for a child of this age. However, you should feed her frequently. Sleeping is a natural phenomenon, and children do and should sleep more than adults. Give her meals at least four to five times a day, and even more if she is hungry. This will enhance her growth.
